TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cinnami, title = Cinnami, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cinnami} }

S.FORM: cinnami Maniq sami krryax cinnami myan sraral nanak, yan nqu tmmyan qulih, tmmyan para. Misuw qaniy aki sami smoya maniq cikah maki ngasal ga, kyalun sami llaqi mha:aki, sknux balay qasa, iyat qaniq sqaniy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

cinnami Maniq sami krryax cinnami myan sraral nanak, yan nqu tmmyan qulih, tmmyan para. Misuw qaniy aki sami smoya maniq cikah maki ngasal ga, kyalun sami llaqi mha:aki, sknux balay qasa, iyat qaniq sqaniy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨinnami maniq s~ɕami krrjax ʦ~ʨinnami mjan s~ɕraral nanak, jan nqu tmmjan quliħ, tmmjan para. mis~ɕuw qanij aki s~ɕami s~ɕmoja maniq ʦ~ʨikaħ maki ŋas~ɕal ɣa, kjalun s~ɕami llaqi mħa:aki, s~ɕknux βalaj qas~ɕa, ijat qaniq s~ɕqanij. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
